demo.title: delu-oracle.sh
demo.code:
# Analyze a Base token by contract address
bankr prompt "Use delu-oracle to analyze 0x22af33fe49fd1fa80c7149773dde5890d3c76f3b"

# Analyze a token by cashtag
bankr prompt "Use delu-oracle to analyze $BNKR and show the decision, conviction, entry, stop, and risks"

# Add checkr social enrichment (+$0.45 USDC)
bankr prompt "Use delu-oracle with social enrichment to analyze $BNKR"

# Analyze a watchlist sequentially
bankr prompt "Use delu-oracle to analyze $BNKR, $DELU, and $CLANKER one at a time, then compare their decisions"

setup: No API key or account required — the endpoint uses x402 on Base
Fund a Base wallet with DELU plus ETH for gas; social enrichment also requires USDC
Calls settle at 0, 50,000, or 250,000 DELU based on the paying wallet's DELU balance
Call sequentially — each x402 Permit2 authorization is single-use
